record.message: geometry :Spatial Datatypes not supported
Catalog MySQL, Schema sakila coalesced to single schema sakila
Index 'idx_unique_manager' on table 'store' has been dropped as it is a duplicate of a constraint
Index 'rental_date' on table 'rental' has been dropped as it is a duplicate of a constraint
Following objects have had name changes applied
Index 'idx_fk_store_id' Changed to 'idx_fk_store_id_1' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Index 'idx_fk_film_id' Changed to 'idx_fk_film_id_1' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Index 'idx_fk_customer_id' Changed to 'idx_fk_customer_id_1' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Index 'idx_fk_staff_id' Changed to 'idx_fk_staff_id_1' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Index 'idx_fk_address_id' Changed to 'idx_fk_address_id_1' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Index 'idx_fk_address_id' Changed to 'idx_fk_address_id_2' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_1' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_2' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_3' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_4' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_5' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_6' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_7' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_8' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_9' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_10' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_11' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_12' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_13' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_14' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Constraint 'PRIMARY' Changed to 'PRIMARY_15' (Invalid characters, reserved word or clash)
Index 'idx_title_description' transformed to index type 'ctxsys.ctxcat' as it indexes a CLOB or BLOB field.
Default Values Transformed: The following column default values have been transformed during conversion
Default value 4.99 has been replaced with '4.99'
sakila.film.rental_rate
Default value 1 has been replaced with '1'
sakila.customer.active
sakila.staff.active
Default value 3 has been replaced with '3'
sakila.film.rental_duration
Default value CURRENT_TIMESTAMP has been replaced with SYSDATE
sakila.actor.last_update
sakila.address.last_update
sakila.category.last_update
sakila.city.last_update
sakila.country.last_update
sakila.customer.last_update
sakila.film.last_update
sakila.film_actor.last_update
sakila.film_category.last_update
sakila.inventory.last_update
sakila.language.last_update
sakila.payment.last_update
sakila.rental.last_update
sakila.staff.last_update
sakila.store.last_update
Default value G has been replaced with 'G'
sakila.film.rating
Default value 19.99 has been replaced with '19.99'
sakila.film.replacement_cost
Convert completed in 0 seconds
Default value 4.99 has been replaced with '4.99'

sakila.film.rating
Default value 19.99 has been replaced with '19.99'
sakila.film.replacement_cost
View 'actor_info' has a language id of 'MySQL' so will not output for generation
View 'customer_list' has a language id of 'MySQL' so will not output for generation
View 'film_list' has a language id of 'MySQL' so will not output for generation

Stored Procedure 'inventory_in_stock' has language id of 'MySQL' so will not output for generation
Failed to disable constraints: Data Move
